socialTrends.name: Tesla, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Massive retail excitement surrounding the expansion of its Robotaxi service to Miami and rumors of upcoming Q2 delivery beats ahead of the July 22 earnings report.

socialTrends.name: Rocket Lab USA, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Social channels are in a frenzy over Rocket Lab's historic $8 billion acquisition of Iridium, with users calling it a game-changing play to contest SpaceX's satellite market.

socialTrends.name: Intel Corporation
socialTrends.summary: Surging discussion as users celebrate Google's massive 3 million TPU order for Intel Foundry, signaling that the Lip-Bu Tan turnaround strategy is yielding actual orders.

socialTrends.name: SoFi Technologies, Inc.
socialTrends.summary: Highly discussed following a strong breakout over $18. Users are highly optimistic about the bank charter scale-up and the launch of the bank-backed 'SoFi USD' stablecoin.

socialTrends.name: NVIDIA Corporation
socialTrends.summary: Intense debate as the stock falls below $200. Long-term bulls are aggressively buy-the-dip focused, while short-term options traders speculate on near-term correction risk.
